channel.title: AP News - US News
channel.description: Top US News stories from AP News

item.title: A violent tornado tears through Oklahoma town, damaging 40 homes but sparing lives
item.description: Officials say a powerful storm churned up multiple tornadoes that barreled through Oklahoma, damaging at least 40 homes and sending emergency crews door-to-door in a hard hit neighborhood.

item.title: Growing wildfires blamed for death of Florida firefighter, destruction of 120 Georgia homes
Appeals court rules that Trump’s asylum ban at the border is illegal
